claim: LightGBM + XGBoost OOF blend improves stable CV over single boosting baselines.
hypothesis: LightGBM and XGBoost OOF blend can reduce variance and improve stable CV.
implementation_requirement: Blend only OOF predictions from EXP003 and EXP004; keep fold split, target encoding boundary, and submission schema unchanged.
conclusion_boundary: Only claim improvement under the fixed CV protocol and completed blend ablations.
